help_menu: Click the buttons below to get information about my commands. Note: All commands can be used with /
help_admins: Admin commands: /pause: Pause the ongoing stream. /resume: Resume the paused stream. /skip: Skip the current stream. /stop: Stop the ongoing stream. /seek [duration in seconds/mm:ss]: Seek the ongoing stream. /seekback [duration]: Seek the ongoing stream backward. /seekforward [duration]: Seek the ongoing stream forward. /loop [disable/single/queue]: Enable loop mode (disable/single track/entire queue). /shuffle: Shuffle the current queue. /channelplay: Configure channel play mode. /reload: Reloads the admin cache. /bots: Show all bots in the group. /groupdata: Show comprehensive group information (id, members, admins, bots, etc).
help_auth: Auth commands: Authorized users can control the ongoing stream without being an admin. /auth: Add a user to the authorized users list. /unauth: Remove a user from the authorized users list. /authlist: Show the current authorized users.
help_blchat: Bl-chat commands: Blacklisted chats cannot use the bot. /blacklistchat [chat_id]: Add a chat to the blacklist. /whitelistchat [chat_id]: Remove a chat from the blacklist. /blacklistedchat: Show all blacklisted chats.
help_bluser: Bl-user commands: Blacklisted users cannot use the bot. /block [user_id]: Block a user from using the bot. /unblock [user_id]: Unblock a user. /blockedusers: Show all blocked users.
help_gban: G-ban commands: Globally ban users across all groups. /gban [user_id] [reason]: Globally ban a user and kick from all groups. /ungban [user_id]: Remove global ban from a user. /gbanlist: Show all globally banned users.
help_loop: Loop commands: /loop: Show current loop mode. /loop disable: Disable loop mode. /loop single: Loop current track only. /loop queue: Loop entire queue.
help_seek: Seek commands: /seek [duration]: Seek to specific time (seconds or mm:ss). /seekback [duration]: Seek backward. /seekforward [duration]: Seek forward. Example: /seek 1:30 or /seek 90
help_shuffle: Shuffle command: /shuffle: Randomly shuffle the current queue order.
help_maintenance: Maintenance mode: Only sudo users can use the bot when maintenance is enabled. /maintenance: Show current status. /maintenance enable: Enable maintenance mode. /maintenance disable: Disable maintenance mode.
help_blist: Blacklist commands: Blacklisted chats and users cannot use the bot. /blacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Add a chat/user to the blacklist. /unblacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Remove a chat/user from the blacklist
help_lang: Language commands: This bot supports multiple languages. /lang: Change the language of the bot.
help_ping: Ping commands:/help: Shows the help menu of the bot. /ping: Check the ping and memory usage of the bot. /start: Start the bot. /sudolist: Shows the list of sudo users of the bot.
help_play: Play commands: You can play music in the voice chat using the following commands. /play [song name/yt url/reply to audio]: Play audio in the voice chat. /vplay [song name/yt url/reply to video]: Play video in the voice chat (if enabled). /cplay [song/url]: Play audio in linked channel. /cvplay [song/url]: Play video in linked channel (if enabled). /playforce: Force play audio (skip queue). /vplayforce: Force play video (skip queue). /radio: Play online radio stations. Inline controls: вҖў В« 10 / В« 30 - Seek backward 10/30 seconds вҖў 30 В» / 10 В» - Seek forward 30/10 seconds вҖў в–· II - Play/pause controls вҖў вҶ» - Replay current track вҖў вҖЈвҖЈI - Skip to next track вҖў в–ў - Stop playback вҖў Delete - Remove player message Loop & Shuffle commands: /loop [disable/single/queue] - Toggle loop mode /shuffle - Shuffle the queue Channel play setup: /channelplay linked - Enable for group's linked channel /channelplay [channel_id] - Enable for specific channel /channelplay disable - Disable channel play Live streams: Supports YouTube live streams Example: /play -f live_stream_name
help_queue: Queue commands: /queue: Shows the currently queued tracks in the queue. /shuffle: Shuffle the current queue randomly. /loop: Enable/disable loop mode for queue or single track.
help_sudo: Sudo commands: /ac: Shows the active calls count. /activevc: Shows the list of the active calls. /broadcast [reply to message]: Broadcasts the message to all the chats. вҖў -nochat: Excludes groups from the broadcast. вҖў -user: Include users in the broadcast. вҖў -copy: Removes forwarded tag. Example: /broadcast -user -copy /eval: Executes the given code. /leave: Make bot and assistant leave the current chat. /leaveall: Make all assistants leave inactive chats. /logs: Sends the log file. /logger [on/off]: Enables/disable the logger. /restart: Restarts the bot. /update: Update bot from git and restart. /addsudo: Add a user to the sudo users list. /rmsudo: Remove a user from the sudo users list.
not_playing: The bot isn't streaming in the video chat.
